mapper.sql: id, user_id, category, title, description, create_time, update_time
id, stage_goal_id, user_id, title, content, learned_hours, estimated_hours, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stage_goal (id, user_id, category, title, description, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{description}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM stage_goal WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sub_goal WHERE stage_goal_id = #{stageGoalId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE stage_goal
user_id = #{userId}, category = #{category}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, is_deleted = #{deleted}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE sub_goal
stage_goal_id = #{stageGoalId}, user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, learned_hours = #{learnedHours}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, is_deleted = #{deleted}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND stage_goal_id = #{stageGoalId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE stage_goal SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sub_goal SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE stage_goal_id = #{stageGoalId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sub_goal SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM stage_goal WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{lastDays} DAY)
ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{exportSize}
